import React from 'react'; import './Pricing.css'; const Pricing = () => (

Pricing

Single Lesson

$40 / hour

10 Lesson Package

$350 (Save $50)

Test Preparation

$60 / session

Extra Fees

None. No hidden charges.

Simple, transparent pricing. No surprises.

); export default Pricing;
